step.title: Load story acceptance criteria
step.action: Read the story file and extract all acceptance criteria.

step.title: Verify each criterion
step.action: Check each acceptance criterion against the implementation. Mark each as met or unmet.

step.title: Check tests exist and pass
step.action: Verify that tests exist for each acceptance criterion and that all tests pass.

step.title: Check code committed
step.action: Verify the implementation code is committed with appropriate commit messages.

step.title: Report PASS/FAIL
step.action: Produce a DoD report. If all criteria are met, route to run-all-reviews. If any fail, route back to dev-story with feedback.
